title: B4Q4 Widget: Cheil Worldwide
description: Samsung Galaxy B4 and Q4 widget UX design as an intern at Cheil Worldwide. Analyzed widget features for B4 and Q4 devices, conducted flow analysis, and created wireframes for Samsung's home screen widget system as part of a 3-person team.

content.value: As a UX Team Intern at Cheil Worldwide, I worked on widget UX design for Samsung Galaxy B4 and Q4 devices. The project involved feature listing, widget analysis, and flow diagrams for Samsung's home screen widget system.

title: Sing In Sign
description: AI-powered service proposal to assist deaf children in sign language learning by transforming auditory activities into visual art and music. The system recognizes sign language gestures in real-time using AI and visualizes them as interactive art experiences.

content.value: Sing In Sign is an AI service proposal designed to help deaf children learn sign language by transforming auditory activities (such as music) into visual and artistic expressions. Using AI-powered gesture recognition (MediaPipe), the system captures sign language movements and renders them as interactive visual art in real-time.

content.caption: Sing In Sign: AI Service Proposal for Deaf Children's Sign Language Learning

title: Podcast Service for Job Seekers
description: Industry-academia collaboration with Samsung Electronics Wireless Business Division. Designed a podcast platform tailored for job seekers through audio content market research, competitor analysis, and user-centered service design.

content.value: A 3-person team industry-academia collaboration with Samsung Electronics Wireless Business Division. Through audio content market analysis (showing 8.61 million units growth) and comparative study of domestic and international podcast apps, we identified opportunities to design a job-seeker-focused podcast service that reduces entry barriers and promotes content diversity.

content.caption: Research overview and audio content market analysis
Feature comparison and service structure
UI design: Home and discovery screens
UI design: Player and episode screens

title: CLOZUMIN
description: Winner of the Social Problem Solving Award at the Human City Design University Student Workshop (Seoul Mayor's Award). A community platform designed to build intimacy among apartment neighbors through shared interests and harmonious problem-solving.

content.value: CLOZUMIN won the Social Problem Solving Award at the Human City Design University Student Workshop, backed by the Seoul Mayor's Award. As a 6-person team, we conducted user research and field studies to address social isolation in apartment communities, designing a service that builds neighbor intimacy by connecting residents across a shared-interest and problem-solving platform.

content.caption: CLOZUMIN: Award-winning community platform overview
Service map: Administrator to residents flow
User research and field study findings
Service concept and interaction design
UI screens: Community features
UI screens: Neighbor connection flows

title: Autonomous Learning Mobility
description: Hyundai Motor Industry-Academia Collaboration exploring the future of education mobility. Designed an autonomous learning space where offline schools become community creativity hubs, featuring wearable key interaction and AI-powered personalized learning environments.

content.value: A 6-person Hyundai Motor Industry-Academia Collaboration addressing future education challenges: declining birthrate and the shift away from face-to-face learning. We proposed an autonomous mobility concept: physical offline spaces that serve as creative practice schools and community hubs, activated by a wearable key for personalized spatial experiences.

content.caption: Autonomous Learning Mobility: concept and ecosystem overview
Wearable key interaction and spatial design detail

title: Cookid's
description: A story-based cooking and art app service designed to enhance children's creativity. Addresses the creativity decline in children by offering interactive, five-senses participatory cooking activities that spark curiosity and inspire diverse thinking.

content.value: Cookid's is a story-based cooking and art app service that enhances children's creativity. Research showed a 4.7% reduction in hippocampal volume linked to creativity decline during COVID-19 isolation. Our 3-person team designed interactive, story-driven cooking experiences engaging all five senses, helping children aged 5–7 explore food ingredients and develop creative thinking at home.

content.caption: Cookid's: Research background and market analysis
Service hypothesis and concept development
UI design: App screens and interaction flows

title: EV Charging Remote Security Mode
description: Individual design proposal for Hyundai addressing the psychological discomfort EV users experience when leaving vehicles unattended during long charging sessions. Features a remote security mode with DSM-based live monitoring for real-time charging status checks.

content.value: Electric vehicle charging can take 7–16 hours, causing users to feel psychological discomfort when leaving their car unattended at a charging port. This individual project for Hyundai proposes a Remote Security Mode, using DSM (Driver Status Monitor) technology to provide live video feeds of the charging area, enabling users to remotely monitor their vehicle and receive immediate notifications of charging status and potential issues.

content.caption: EV Charging Remote Security Mode: background, solution, and user flow
DSM integration and charging security mode UI detail

title: Interactive Story Authoring Tool Based on Generative Language Models
description: Research and prototype design for an AI-powered interactive story authoring tool using generative language models, published with Springer Nature. Users shape narratives through branching choices, with AI generating character traits, plot elements, and narrative arcs.

content.value: A 3-person research project published with Springer Nature, designing a prototype for an AI-powered interactive story authoring tool. Building on related work from Inkweaver and Twine, we designed a system where users without programming knowledge can create branching interactive stories guided by AI-generated narrative elements, including character personality types (flat/round), 20 master plot archetypes, and attribute-driven story progression.

content.caption: Research background, related work, and interactive UI concept
Prototype design: story authoring interface
